name: openclaw-langgraph-bridge
description: OpenClaw plugin bridging Kit-as-orchestrator with LangGraph workflows. Tools: langgraph_dispatch, langgraph_inspect. Webhook routes events back into Kit's session via enqueueSystemEvent + requestHeartbeat. Per-Slack-thread isolation via managedFlows.

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
